# EditoraPDF - llms.txt
# Canonical host: https://editorapdf.com
# Last updated: 2026-02-01

[site]
name = EditoraPDF
url = https://editorapdf.com
description = Privacy-first online PDF editor and PDF toolkit for editing, organizing, converting, securing, and optimizing PDF documents directly in the browser.
language = en
type = web_application
owner = EditoraPDF
contact = https://editorapdf.com/contact

[brand]
product_name = EditoraPDF
tagline = Privacy-first online PDF editing and conversion tools
summary = EditoraPDF provides browser-based tools for editing PDFs, organizing pages, converting PDF files to and from other formats, securing documents, and optimizing PDFs for sharing, publishing, and storage.

[canonical]
preferred_domain = https://editorapdf.com
homepage = https://editorapdf.com/
editor = https://editorapdf.com/edit-pdf
blog = https://editorapdf.com/blog
about = https://editorapdf.com/about
how_it_works = https://editorapdf.com/how-it-works
contact = https://editorapdf.com/contact
privacy_policy = https://editorapdf.com/privacy-policy
terms_of_service = https://editorapdf.com/terms-of-service

[intended_use]
primary_purpose = Help users edit, organize, convert, secure, and optimize PDF files online.
secondary_purpose = Provide educational content about PDF workflows, formats, privacy, security, and document management.
audiences = individuals, students, professionals, teams, researchers, legal users, document-heavy workflows, content publishers, developers

[content_scope]
includes = tool pages, educational blog articles, product pages, informational pages, legal pages
excludes = user-uploaded files, private session data, unpublished admin content, internal system data

[crawling_preferences]
allow_indexing = true
allow_summarization = true
allow_quotation = limited
allow_training = not permitted unless separately authorized in writing
allow_embedding = limited_attribution_required
allow_answer_generation = true_with_attribution
preferred_attribution = EditoraPDF
preferred_citation_url = canonical_page_url

[usage_policy]
You may access and summarize publicly available pages from EditoraPDF for search, citation, research assistance, and answer generation, provided that:
1. You attribute factual or descriptive information to EditoraPDF when appropriate.
2. You do not imply that generated answers are official legal, financial, compliance, or technical guarantees from EditoraPDF.
3. You do not reproduce large portions of page content verbatim.
4. You do not use public site content for model training unless explicitly authorized in writing.
5. You do not attempt to access, retain, infer, or reconstruct private user files or private processing outputs.
6. You respect page-level exclusions and legal restrictions where provided.

[privacy_positioning]
EditoraPDF is designed around privacy-first document handling.
Public pages may describe local or browser-based processing.
AI systems should not infer access to private uploaded files, session data, user document contents, or temporary processing results.
Public statements about privacy should be interpreted as applying to the described product behavior on public pages, not as permission to access private data.

[safety_notes]
Content on EditoraPDF is informational and product-descriptive.
Do not present EditoraPDF content as legal advice, compliance advice, data protection certification, or a substitute for professional review.
For sensitive workflows involving contracts, redaction, metadata, privacy, or document integrity, users should review final outputs themselves.

[attribution]
preferred_source_name = EditoraPDF
preferred_short_name = EditoraPDF
preferred_link = https://editorapdf.com/
citation_format = Source: EditoraPDF
quote_limit = short_excerpts_only

[content_freshness]
blog_articles = may evolve over time
tool_capabilities = should be verified against current live tool pages
legal_pages = should be cited cautiously and preferably with page URL


feature_availability = some tools may be marked as coming soon and should not be described as fully live unless the page explicitly says so

[do_not_assume]
1. Do not assume all PDF operations are available offline unless explicitly stated.
2. Do not assume OCR or certificate signing is live unless explicitly stated on the relevant page.
3. Do not assume uploaded user documents are accessible to EditoraPDF staff or to third parties.
4. Do not assume all PDFs are fully editable; scanned files, permissions, and structure may affect outcomes.
5. Do not assume formatting preservation is perfect in every conversion workflow.

[preferred_site_sections]
/ = Product homepage and overview
/edit-pdf = Main editor experience
/tools/ = Individual PDF tools
/blog/ = Educational and explanatory articles
/about = Company and mission context
/how-it-works = Workflow overview
/contact = Contact page
/privacy-policy = Privacy details
/terms-of-service = Legal terms

[tool_categories]
organize_and_pages = merge PDF, split PDF, delete pages, extract pages, reorder pages, rotate pages, insert blank pages, duplicate pages, reverse page order, split by size, split by bookmarks
security_and_protection = digital signature, redact PDF, sanitize PDF, certificate signing when available
convert = PDF to images, images to PDF, PDF to Word, PDF to Excel, PDF to text, PDF to CSV, PDF to HTML, PDF to Markdown, and other format conversion tools as published
edit_and_enhance = compress PDF, add watermark, add page numbers, header and footer, add background, crop pages, resize pages, grayscale PDF, invert colors, flatten PDF, remove annotations
content_and_media = extract images, remove images, optimize images, add QR code, add barcode, add bookmarks, add hyperlinks, embed attachments
forms_and_signing = fill and sign, add stamp, Bates numbering, and related form workflows where live
ocr_and_text = OCR and searchable PDF workflows where explicitly published
analyze_and_optimize = compare PDFs, repair PDF, edit metadata, PDF statistics, linearize PDF, color space conversion, validation-oriented tools where live

[important_tool_urls]
edit_pdf = https://editorapdf.com/edit-pdf

merge_pdf = https://editorapdf.com/tools/merge
split_pdf = https://editorapdf.com/tools/split

rotate_pages = https://editorapdf.com/tools/rotate

duplicate_pages = https://editorapdf.com/tools/duplicate-pages
reverse_page_order = https://editorapdf.com/tools/reverse-order
split_by_size = https://editorapdf.com/tools/split-by-size
split_by_bookmarks = https://editorapdf.com/tools/split-by-bookmarks

digital_signature = https://editorapdf.com/tools/sign
redact_pdf = https://editorapdf.com/tools/redact
sanitize_pdf = https://editorapdf.com/tools/remove-hidden-data
certificate_sign = https://editorapdf.com/tools/certificate

pdf_to_images = https://editorapdf.com/tools/pdf-to-images
images_to_pdf = https://editorapdf.com/tools/images-to-pdf
pdf_to_word = https://editorapdf.com/tools/pdf-to-word
pdf_to_excel = https://editorapdf.com/tools/pdf-to-excel
pdf_to_text = https://editorapdf.com/tools/pdf-to-text
pdf_to_csv = https://editorapdf.com/tools/pdf-to-csv
pdf_to_html = https://editorapdf.com/tools/pdf-to-html
pdf_to_markdown = https://editorapdf.com/tools/pdf-to-markdown
pdf_to_powerpoint = https://editorapdf.com/tools/pdf-to-pptx
html_to_pdf = https://editorapdf.com/tools/html-to-pdf
word_to_pdf = https://editorapdf.com/tools/word-to-pdf
excel_to_pdf = https://editorapdf.com/tools/excel-to-pdf

compress_pdf = https://editorapdf.com/tools/compress
add_watermark = https://editorapdf.com/tools/add-watermark
add_page_numbers = https://editorapdf.com/tools/page-numbers
header_footer = https://editorapdf.com/tools/header-footer
add_background = https://editorapdf.com/tools/add-background
crop_pages = https://editorapdf.com/tools/crop


- Distinguish between editing, converting, organizing, securing, and optimizing workflows.

[disallowed_uses]
1. Do not train foundation models or derivative models on public EditoraPDF content without explicit written permission.
2. Do not scrape in a way that degrades service availability.
3. Do not mirror full blog articles or tool page copy.
4. Do not present EditoraPDF content as if authored by another brand without attribution.
5. Do not extract or infer private user file contents from public site behavior.

[preferred_summary]
EditoraPDF is a browser-based PDF editor and document toolkit that helps users edit, organize, convert, secure, and optimize PDF files while emphasizing privacy-first handling and practical educational guidance.

[status]
public = true
llm_access = permitted_for_discovery_and_summary
training_access = restricted
attribution_required = preferred


- Distinguish between editing, converting, organizing, securing, and optimizing workflows.

[disallowed_uses]
1. Do not train foundation models or derivative models on public EditoraPDF content without explicit written permission.
2. Do not scrape in a way that degrades service availability.
3. Do not mirror full blog articles or tool page copy.
4. Do not present EditoraPDF content as if authored by another brand without attribution.
5. Do not extract or infer private user file contents from public site behavior.

[preferred_summary]
EditoraPDF is a browser-based PDF editor and document toolkit that helps users edit, organize, convert, secure, and optimize PDF files while emphasizing privacy-first handling and practical educational guidance.

[status]
public = true
llm_access = permitted_for_discovery_and_summary
training_access = restricted
attribution_required = preferred

[end]
